en_title: New DLC Character Coming to BlazBlue: Central Fiction a Decade After It Was Released
cn_title: 《苍翼默示录》发售近十年后突曝新DLC角色
subtitle: 十年一剑
opus_summary: 时隔近十年，Arc System Works为《苍翼默示录：中枢幻象》追加全新DLC角色，详情本周末EVO 2026公开。制作人小泽陆感谢全球玩家支持，确认角色出自系列主线。

paragraphs.en: Arc System Works is blowing the dust off its 2015 2D fighting game BlazBlue: Central Fiction and adding a new DLC character a decade down the track.
paragraphs.cn: Arc System Works重新拾起了2015年发售的2D格斗游戏《苍翼默示录：中枢幻象》，在时隔近十年后为其添加一名新DLC角色。

paragraphs.en: Arc System Works made the announcement in a note at the end of a brief teaser trailer today, as part of its 2026 showcase. However, the publisher otherwise refrained from adding any further specifics about the character itself. Fans will not need to wait long, though, as the complete reveal of the character will occur at EVO 2026 this weekend.
paragraphs.cn: Arc System Works在今天公开的一支简短预告片末尾以注释形式公布了这一消息，作为其2026年展示活动的一部分。不过，除此之外，发行商并未透露该角色的任何进一步详情。但粉丝们无需等待太久，因为该角色的完整揭晓将在本周末的EVO 2026上进行。

paragraphs.en: “As you saw in the trailer, we will be adding a new playable character to the game,” said BlazBlue: Central Fiction producer Riku Ozawa during the showcase. “It’s been many years since this game [was] released. We were able to make this new development happen thanks to the continued support of fans around the world who have kept the game alive. Truly, thank you so much.”
paragraphs.cn: 「正如大家在预告片中看到的，我们将为游戏添加一名新的可玩角色，」《苍翼默示录：中枢幻象》制作人小泽陆在展示活动上说道。「这款游戏已经发售很多年了。我们之所以能实现这次新开发，要感谢全球粉丝的持续支持，是他们让游戏一直保持着生命力。真的非常感谢大家。」

paragraphs.en: According to Ozawa, development for this DLC character was only settled “very recently.”
paragraphs.cn: 据小泽陆透露，这名DLC角色的开发工作「最近才刚刚」敲定。

paragraphs.en: “Normally, we should wait to make the announcement until we have footage of the character in-game,” he conceded. “This time, however, I wanted to share with everyone that we are working on this as soon as I could, so we’ve made this announcement without gameplay footage.”
paragraphs.cn: 「通常来说，我们应该等到有了角色在游戏中的实机画面再公布消息，」他坦言道。「但这次我想尽快告诉大家我们正在制作这个角色，所以我们在没有实机画面的情况下就公布了。」

paragraphs.en: Ozawa confirmed the new character will be “a certain someone who has appeared in the main BlazBlue games.”
paragraphs.cn: 小泽陆确认，这名新角色将是「曾在《苍翼默示录》正传作品中出现过的某位角色。」

paragraphs.en: Developed by 2D fighting game specialists Arc System Works, BlazBlue: Central Fiction was initially released in arcades in late 2015 before arriving on PS3 and PS4 in late 2016. The game was subsequently ported to PC and Switch.
paragraphs.cn: 由2D格斗游戏专家Arc System Works开发，《苍翼默示录：中枢幻象》最初于2015年底登陆街机，随后于2016年底登陆PS3和PS4。该作之后被移植到PC和Switch。

paragraphs.en: Luke is a Senior Editor on the IGN reviews team. You can track him down on Bluesky @mrlukereilly to ask him things about stuff.
paragraphs.cn: Luke是IGN评测团队的高级编辑。你可以在Bluesky上找到他 @mrlukereilly，问问他各种事情。
